pi_items.source: Verified in risk_policy_memo.txt generated in setup_task.sh (lines 34-38): 'INPUT DATA: (1) Credit Score (integer) (2) Annual Income (currency) (3) Loan Amount (currency) (4) Monthly Debt (currency)'

Verified in risk_policy_memo.txt (lines 40-56): '1. Determine "Risk Tier"' (depends on Credit Score), '2. Calculate "DTI Ratio" (Debt-to-Income)' (requires Annual Income and Monthly Debt), '3. Determine "Pre-Qualification Result"' (requires Risk Tier, DTI Ratio, and Loan Amount)

Derived from logic dependencies in risk_policy_memo.txt: Credit Score→Risk Tier (1), Annual Income→DTI Ratio (1), Monthly Debt→DTI Ratio (1), Risk Tier→Pre-Qualification Result (1), DTI Ratio→Pre-Qualification Result (1), Loan Amount→Pre-Qualification Result (1). Total: 6 edges

privileged_info_summary: This task creates a Decision Requirements Diagram (DRD) based on synthetic business logic. The memo specifies 4 input data nodes (Credit Score, Annual Income, Loan Amount, Monthly Debt) and 3 decision nodes (Risk Tier, DTI Ratio, Pre-Qualification Result). The dependency graph includes 6 information requirement edges: Credit Score feeds Risk Tier; Annual Income and Monthly Debt feed DTI Ratio; and Risk Tier, DTI Ratio, and Loan Amount feed Pre-Qualification Result. The diagram must be saved as loan_drd.drawio and exported to loan_drd.png on the Desktop.
